purpose: Fixtures for milestone quality, gate discipline, canonical plan output, and plan richness.

input.intent: Add lightweight eval scaffolding for the planning skills so future prompt edits have obvious regression coverage.
research_signals: The repo currently has almost no bundled eval material under skills/.
The change should stay lightweight and conservative.
The highest-leverage path is local context -> plan synthesis.

must_include: plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>-plan.md output shape
3-7 independently executable milestones
a concrete acceptance criterion for every milestone
risks or open questions that stay outside milestone scope
approach rationale explaining why this approach was chosen
multi-condition acceptance criteria for non-trivial milestones
must_not: milestones like 'finish wiring' or 'polish' without a checkable done state
plan writing before required research is present
overview that merely restates the intent without approach justification

input.intent: Plan a migration from one adapter model to another.
research_signals: No local context results yet
User has not chosen between backward-compatible and breaking migration modes

must_include: specific missing research or unresolved decision
one targeted unblock question or missing research request
must_not: emit milestone text from partial inputs

input.intent: Add validation to API endpoints and refactor auth middleware.
research_signals: Local context found zod validation patterns in src/api/auth.ts
Tests use vitest with describe/it structure
Auth middleware is in src/middleware/auth.ts
Token validation is duplicated in 3 route handlers

must_include: scope metadata on each milestone with relevant file paths
conventions metadata referencing discovered patterns
review policy for each milestone
must_not: leave all file paths only in the Research Summary
milestones without scope or conventions when context was available

input.intent: Add rate limiting to the public API.
research_signals: Rate limiter middleware exists at src/middleware/ratelimit.ts
Current limit is hardcoded to 100 req/min
Tests use supertest for integration testing

must_include: acceptance criteria clear enough for a builder to determine done vs blocked
each milestone has a checkable done state (e.g., tests pass, config value present)
no milestone requires a builder to invent context not present in the plan
must_not: acceptance criteria like 'works correctly' without a measurable check
milestones that depend on unstated external decisions

input.intent: Fix a typo in the README and update the changelog.
research_signals: Change is confined to README.md and CHANGELOG.md
No code files involved, no conventions to record

must_include: valid plan with plain checkbox milestones (no scope or conventions required)
milestone lines in - [ ] N. Title - brief summary format
must_not: require scope or conventions metadata when research found none
treat missing enriched metadata as a plan format error

input.intent: Refactor the authentication middleware to support both JWT and session-based auth.
research_signals: Current auth middleware is in src/middleware/auth.ts using JWT only
Session store uses express-session with Redis adapter at src/config/session.ts
Tests use supertest with mock JWT tokens
User model has both token and session fields but session field is unused
Three route files import auth middleware directly

must_include: overview explains why dual auth is needed and which approach was chosen over alternatives
research summary cites specific file-level findings (not just file names)
key decisions section explains milestone ordering rationale
milestone descriptions explain what and why, not just what
multi-condition acceptance criteria for non-trivial milestones
risks cite specific files or areas where the refactor could break things
must_not: overview that only restates the intent without approach rationale
research summary that lists file names without specific findings
milestones with only a title line and no description for a complex refactor
single-word acceptance criteria like 'works' or 'tests pass'

input.intent: Add a parser fix plus targeted test coverage for a runtime code path.
research_signals: The milestone changes executable code
A targeted test command exists for parser behavior
Final completion will depend on runnable verification evidence

must_include: Verify: block on executable-artifact milestones
verification intent that implies running the code, not just reading it
must_not: leave verification implied without a Verify: block
treat a code-change milestone like a read-only artifact
